/app/[locale]/layout.title: Kampisos - Aynu itak uomare p
/app/[locale]/layout.description: アイヌ語・日本語のキーワードを入力して複数のコーパスを検索できます

/app/[locale]/page.heading: Aynu Itak or peka Huymampa=an Ro
/app/[locale]/page.subtitle: Oro ta 150,000 akkari itak oka <wbr></wbr>Sisam itak Aynu itak uomare  p

/app/[locale]/about/page.title: Tanpe hemanta an?
/app/[locale]/about/page.description: Aynu itak Sisam itak a=nuye wa usa oka kampisos or wa ne itak a=hunara ruwe ne.

/app/[locale]/error.title: A=ekampakko pakoat an
/app/[locale]/error.description: A=ekampakko pakoat an. Oattapne, iruka i=tere wa kanna suy kar wa inkar yan.

/app/[locale]/search/page.title: “{query}” a=hunara wa a=pa p
/app/[locale]/search/page.description: “{query}” ani a=pa Aynu itak oruspe ene an hi. Ipehe ne ya, mak a=eywanke p ne ya, sino an oruspe ani a=hunara ro.
/app/[locale]/search/page.subtitle: Aynu itak Sisam itak uomare p or wa hunaraytak kor oruspe patek a=i=nukarare wa an=an

/app/[locale]/search/MobileFilterButton.title: Iesoye
/app/[locale]/search/MobileFilterButton.description: Poronno an oruspe pirkano esoye kuni mak an oruspe a=nukar rusuy ya ka nume yan.

/app/[locale]/search/Result.no_result: Neno an oruspe sinep ka isam
/app/[locale]/search/Result.no_result_hint: Sinna ahunarap, sinna iesoyne irenka a=numke wa suy inkar yan.

/components/Entry/EntryDetailsDialog.title: Comommomop
/components/Entry/EntryDetailsDialog.description: Tan oruspe kor comommomop ne ruwe ne. Sinna itak ka oka nankor pe ne kusu, yaytupare yan.
/components/Entry/EntryDetailsDialog.author: Inuyekur
